task:
/home/user/Documents/reference.ply and /home/user/Documents/misaligned.ply are ASCII PLYs with 1200 points each. misaligned.ply is the same object as reference.ply but rotated ~10 degrees around Z and translated roughly by (2, 1, 0.5).

Run ICP fine registration with default options using misaligned.ply as the to-be-aligned (compared) entity and reference.ply as the reference, then export the aligned (compared) cloud as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/aligned.ply. Do not export the reference cloud. The aligned cloud must have 1200 points, and its bounding box must fall within [-2.5, -2.5, -2.5]..[5.5, 2.5, 2.5] (approximately the reference cloud's bounds).

verification.description: Aligned cloud has the same 1200 points
Aligned cloud bbox falls within reference cloud bbox
